# Generated by Copilot under FIS AI Policy
# ! Evalutation ONLY ! Developed using the Github Copilot Feature Testing org - NOT FOR PRODUCTION WORK
# ============================================================================
# T34 - Mixed Workload (Realistic Simulation, 400 Total Operations)
# ============================================================================
# Validates: OMS handles a realistic mix of operations.
#            400 total operations across 4 phases of 100 iterations each:
#            ~50% new orders, ~25% cancels, ~25% modifies.
#            Across multiple symbols with randomized prices.
# Measures: Mixed-operation throughput
# ============================================================================

Reset
SenderCompId:{{SENDER_COMP_ID}}
TargetCompId:{{TARGET_COMP_ID}}
Connect:{{OMS_HOST}}:{{OMS_PORT}}

# Expect Logon acknowledgment
Wait:35=A

Message:T34 START $TIMESTAMP

# Phase 1: Submit a base of 100 orders (resting book)
# These provide a base for subsequent cancels and modifies to operate on
Execute:helpers\T34_new_order.txt:100

Message:T34 PHASE1_BOOK_BUILT $TIMESTAMP

# Phase 2: Mixed workload - 300 operations across 3 batches
# Interleaved: new pairs, cancels, modifies, more pairs

# Batch A: 100 buy-sell pairs (200 orders) - create fills
Execute:helpers\T34_order_pair.txt:100

Message:T34 PHASE2A_ORDERS $TIMESTAMP

# Batch B: 100 submit+cancel pairs
Execute:helpers\T34_submit_cancel.txt:100

Message:T34 PHASE2B_CANCELS $TIMESTAMP

# Batch C: 100 submit+modify cycles
Execute:helpers\T34_submit_modify.txt:100

Message:T34 PHASE2C_MODIFIES $TIMESTAMP

# Batch D: 100 more buy-sell pairs (200 orders)
Execute:helpers\T34_order_pair.txt:100

Message:T34 END $TIMESTAMP

Message:T34 PASSED - 400 mixed operations processed

# Verify: at least 200 execution reports received
VerifyCount:35=8:>=200

Save:results\T34_result.txt
Disconnect
